description: Existing anchored LRQ mixture body plus global N, canonical family D, and ND cross terms.
Paper first-order domain synergy adapted as centered domain-specific D-scaling heads.
Same as first-order domain, using log(D/D0) exactly from z_k(D)-z_k(D0).
First-order synergy on source-aware groups instead of all 39 domains.
First-order synergy on the canonical MCT-LRQ family partition.

Paper second-order soft-min co-occurrence terms on source-aware groups, tau=0.1.
Paper second-order soft-min co-occurrence terms on source-aware groups, tau=1.
Source-aware first-order plus second-order soft-min synergy.
Source-aware first-order, entropy, and second-order synergy terms.
